prompt: I need to upgrade this DroidCon KMP project to AGP 9.0. Currently on AGP 8.13.1. The shared and shared-ui modules use kotlin.multiplatform + com.android.library. The android module is a pure Android app with kotlin("android") which is now built-in. The project uses SQLDelight, SKIE, and Firebase Crashlytics. Please do the full migration.
source: DroidCon event app — shared + shared-ui are KMP+library (Path A), android has kotlin.android
agent_rubric: The shared module's com.android.library plugin is replaced with com.android.kotlin.multiplatform.library
The shared-ui module's com.android.library plugin is also replaced with com.android.kotlin.multiplatform.library
Both shared and shared-ui have their android {} blocks nested inside kotlin { }
The org.jetbrains.kotlin.android plugin is removed from the android module
Firebase Crashlytics and Google Services plugin compatibility with AGP 9 is handled
AGP version in gradle/libs.versions.toml is updated to 9.0.0 or higher
Gradle wrapper in gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties is updated to 9.1.0 or higher
No removed gradle properties are present in gradle.properties (android.enableLegacyVariantApi, android.r8.integratedResourceShrinking, android.enableNewResourceShrinker.preciseShrinking)
The migration does not break the existing dependency structure between modules
